assertions.description: INCORRECT: The PCB defines 4 copper layers: F.Cu (0), Gnd (1), Vdd (2), and B.Cu (31). Layers Gnd and Vdd are inner planes filled entirely with GND and +3V3 zones respectively (both zones are filled, area ~15808 mm2). However copper_layers_used=0 and copper_layer_names=[] because the counter only counts layers with track segments, not zones. Zone-only planes are copper and should be included in the layer count. The board is a 4-layer design, not a 0-layer design.
